creator: dsh@wizard.volgograd.ru
text:
- Update to 2.6.5

Dear commiter, could you add next text to /usr/ports/UPDATING:

  Read

    https://oss.gonicus.de/labs/gosa/wiki/DocumentationInstallingUpdatingGOsa

  before upgrading this port. And don't forget to check your
  slapd.conf because gosa scheme files was changed. If you'll have any
  troubles during LDAP migration step try to restart your PHP process.
